title: cymbalariella mollis
intro: Cymbalariella mollis, also known as Soft-fruited Cymbalariella, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cymbalariella mollis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a dried herb or in the form of a decoction, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
